hero.title: Welcome To Ship Jet
hero.subtitle: Your trusted courier partner connecting you to Jamaica. Real-time tracking, transparent pricing, and flights arriving Monday & Friday.

announcement.text: Holiday Alert: Cutoff for Friday flights is Thursday at 2:00 PM

flightSchedule.description: Flights arrive in Jamaica twice weekly
flightSchedule.pickupNote: Generally available for pick-up the next day

howWeWork.title: How We Work
howWeWork.subtitle: Shipping with us is simple, transparent, and fast. Get started in just 4 easy steps.

steps.title: Register for Account
steps.description: Sign up for a free Ship Jet account and instantly receive your personal mailbox number and US shipping address.

steps.title: Note Mailbox Number
steps.description: Keep note of your unique mailbox number (e.g. SJC-12345). It must be included in your shipping address on all orders.

steps.title: Shop Online & Use Address
steps.description: Shop at any online store and enter our Florida warehouse address along with your mailbox number at checkout.

steps.title: Check Dashboard for Updates
steps.description: Log into your secure customer dashboard to track shipments in real-time, view invoice status, and manage deliveries.

videoGuide.title: Video Walkthrough: Ship Jet Dashboard & Services
videoGuide.description: Watch this brief 2-minute video to see how to use your new US shipping address, upload invoices, and navigate your dashboard.

aboutUs.title: About Ship Jet
aboutUs.description: Ship Jet is your trusted partner in seamless, cost-effective international logistics. We specialize in freight forwarding and courier services — connecting Jamaica to the world with unmatched reliability, speed, and transparency.
features: Expert concierge shopping assistance (5% cash / 10% debit)
Air & sea freight forwarding for all package sizes

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.subtitle: Have questions about packages, rates, or custom shipping needs? Our support team is here to help.
contact.hours: Mon - Fri: 8:30 AM - 5:00 PM | Sat: 9:00 AM - 1:00 PM
